deliverables.description: Hourly electrolyzer dispatch table with renewable use, grid purchases, hydrogen output, cost, margin, and curtailment.
Operations note with formulas, hourly calculations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and decision table.

summary.dispatch_policy: Run the electrolyzer at 12 MW in every hour; use renewables first and buy grid power only when needed to top up to full load, since all grid prices are below the break-even threshold.
